recommendations.title: Ali G Indahouse
recommendations.overview: Ali G unwittingly becomes a pawn in the evil Chancellor's plot to overthrow the Prime Minister of Great Britain. However, instead of bringing the Prime Minister down, Ali is embraced by the nation as the voice of youth and 'realness', making the Prim

recommendations.title: The Art of War II: Betrayal
recommendations.overview: Agent Neil Shaw is called out of retirement and finds himself in the midst of a plot to assassinate several leading Senators with himself set-up to take the rap for a recent killing

recommendations.title: Attack
recommendations.overview: With the Parliament under siege, India’s first super soldier Arjun Shergill is tasked to get hold of the terrorists in time, save the Prime Minister from their clutches and stop a dirty bomb from exploding and destroying Delhi.

recommendations.title: Norman: The Moderate Rise and Tragic Fall of a New York Fixer
recommendations.overview: A financial schemer finds himself in the middle of an international scandal after he becomes a political adviser to the new Prime Minister of Israel.

recommendations.title: Heads of State
recommendations.overview: The UK Prime Minister and US President have a public rivalry that risks their countries' alliance. But when they become targets of a powerful enemy, they're forced to rely on each other as they go on a wild, multinational run. Allied with Noel, a bri

recommendations.title: Angel Has Fallen
recommendations.overview: After a treacherous attack, Secret Service agent Mike Banning is charged with attempting to assassinate President Trumbull. Chased by his own colleagues and the FBI, Banning begins a race against the clock to clear his name.

recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood 2: Love Song of Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Lady Snowblood is caught by the police and sentenced to death for her crimes. As she is sent to the gallows she is rescued by the secret police who offer her a deal to assassinate some revolutionaries.

recommendations.title: Love and Death
recommendations.overview: In czarist Russia, a neurotic soldier and his distant cousin formulate a plot to assassinate Napoleon.

recommendations.title: The Eagle Has Landed
recommendations.overview: When the Nazi high command learns in late 1943 that Winston Churchill will be spending time at a country estate in Norfolk, it hatches an audacious scheme to kidnap the prime minister and spirit him to Germany for enforced negotiations with Hitler.

recommendations.title: The Desert Fox: The Story of Rommel
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Erwin Rommel and his involvement in the plot to assassinate Hitler.
